name: dental-outreach
description: Enrichment pipeline for AI Practice Systems for Dentists outreach: derive domain, guess email via waterfall, score fit, and draft a personalized opener.

columns.name: ai_fit_score
columns.prompt: Rate 1-10 how good a fit this dental practice is for an 'AI Practice Systems for Dentists' program (AI-powered front desk, recall, treatment-plan follow-up). Practice: {{practice_name}}, {{city}}, {{state}}. Chairs: {{chairs}}. Notes: {{notes}}. Higher = independent practice, multiple chairs, growth signals. Reply with ONLY the number.

columns.name: ai_opener
columns.prompt: Write a 2-sentence personalized cold-email opener to {{owner_name}} at {{practice_name}} in {{city}}, {{state}}, from Dr. Pascal Nguyen, a dentist who teaches other dentists to install AI systems (front desk, recall, treatment follow-up) in their practice. Reference something concrete from these notes: {{notes}}. Warm, peer-to-peer, no hype, no exclamation marks. Reply with ONLY the two sentences.
